AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: AI features are not configured on this instance.

APPLICATION_NOT_OWNED: You do not own this application

ATS_RESUME_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_SEMANTIC: resumeId is required when semantic validation is enabled
AUTO_APPLY_ALREADY_RUNNING: An auto-apply job is already running for this user
AUTOMATION_ITEM_NOT_OWNED: You do not own this item
CAN_ONLY_EDIT_OWN_THEMES: Can only edit your own themes
CANNOT_APPLY_TO_OWN_JOB: You cannot apply to your own job
CANNOT_DELETE_OTHERS_COMMENT: You can only delete your own comments
CANNOT_DELETE_OTHERS_POST: You can only delete your own posts
CANNOT_DELETE_OWN_ACCOUNT_AS_ADMIN: Cannot delete your own account through admin interface
CANNOT_ENDORSE_SELF: You cannot endorse your own skills
CANNOT_RECOMMEND_SELF: You cannot write a recommendation for yourself
CANNOT_SEND_MESSAGE_TO_USER: Cannot send message to this user
COLLABORATOR_ALREADY_INVITED: This user is already a collaborator
COMMENT_NOT_OWNED: You can only modify your own comments
DSL_EVALUATION_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: DSL evaluation exceeded the instruction limit
DSL_NORMALIZED_MISSING: Validation succeeded but normalized DSL is missing

EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Email address must be verified to access this resource
FILE_REQUIRED: File is required for this operation
FILE_UPLOAD_UNAVAILABLE: File upload service is currently unavailable
GITHUB_USERNAME_MISSING: No GitHub username found in resume
INTERNAL_AUTH_NOT_CONFIGURED: Internal API token not configured. Set INTERNAL_API_TOKEN environment variable.
INVALID_DATE_RANGE: End date must be after start date
INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: Password reset token is invalid or has expired
JOB_IMPORT_FETCH_FAILED: Could not fetch the URL within the allowed window
JOB_IMPORT_INVALID_URL: The URL provided is not a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL
JOB_IMPORT_PAGE_TOO_THIN: The page did not contain enough text to extract a job posting
LAST_ADMIN_CANNOT_BE_REMOVED: Cannot remove admin role from the last admin user
LAST_MANAGER_CANNOT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete the last user with management permissions
MEC_CSV_BLOCKED: Received HTML instead of CSV - Cloudflare may still be blocking
MEC_CSV_EMPTY: CSV file is empty or has no data rows
MEC_CSV_NO_RESPONSE: No response received from MEC CSV source
MEC_SYNC_IN_PROGRESS: Sync already in progress. Please wait for the current sync to complete.
NO_PRIMARY_RESUME: User has no primary resume to compute fit score against
NOT_A_COLLABORATOR: Not a collaborator on this resume
NOT_CONNECTION_REQUESTER: Only the requester can withdraw a sent request
NOT_CONVERSATION_PARTICIPANT: Not a participant of this conversation
NOT_JOB_OWNER: Only the job owner can perform this action
NOT_PART_OF_CONNECTION: You are not part of this connection
NOTIFICATION_NOT_OWNED: You can only act on your own notifications
ONBOARDING_ALREADY_COMPLETED: Onboarding is already completed for this user
ONLY_ADMINS_CAN_DO_THIS: Only admins can perform this action
ONLY_RESUME_OWNER_CAN_INVITE: Only resume owner can invite collaborators
ONLY_RESUME_OWNER_CAN_UPDATE_ROLES: Only resume owner can update roles
ONLY_RESUME_OWNER_OR_SELF_CAN_REMOVE: Only owner can remove collaborators, or you can remove yourself
OWNERSHIP_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not own this resource
PASSWORD_SAME_AS_CURRENT: New password must be different from current password
PASSWORD_WEAK: Password does not meet security requirements
PDF_NO_TEXT: PDF does not contain extractable text
PDF_TOO_LARGE: PDF file exceeds the maximum allowed size
POLL_ALREADY_VOTED: You have already voted on this poll
POLL_CLOSED: This poll is closed to new votes
POST_ALREADY_REPORTED: You have already reported this post
POST_ALREADY_REPOSTED: You have already reposted this post
PRIMARY_RESUME_REQUIRED: A primary resume is required for this operation
